timing.asap: As soon as it applies — this lands near the top of a roadmap, in the first weeks.
timing.yearlyWindow: A yearly obligation — each year's window closes at the end of {{month}}.
timing.recurring: A recurring obligation that comes back on a fixed calendar schedule.
timing.follows: Follows “{{step}}” — due within {{days}} days once that step is done.

tip.visa: Consulate appointments book out weeks ahead — secure the slot first, then assemble the paperwork.
tip.residency: Book the cita previa now — appointment slots are the real bottleneck, not the paperwork.
tip.tax: If in doubt, a gestor can prepare this in a day — cheap insurance against a mis-filing.
tip.health: Sort this before you need it — coverage gaps are the expensive kind of surprise.
tip.mobility: Start early: exams, appointments and offices here all run on waiting lists.
tip.banking: Bring every document on the list — incomplete applications get rejected on the spot.
tip.family: Family paperwork often needs certified (sworn) translations — check before the appointment.
tip.property: Don’t sign or transfer anything before the checks clear — this step protects the purchase.
tip.admin: A short errand once your documents are ready — book the cita previa and tick it off.

index.title: Every step of moving to Spain, explained.
index.dek1: These {{count}} steps are the same catalog Get Camino builds roadmaps from — each with what it is, when it's due, and the official source. Which ones apply to
index.dek2: , and in what order, is what the free interview works out.

detail.regionalBody: The specifics are set by each comunidad autónoma — the official source covers the national rules; your region's own rates and windows apply. Get Camino's interview asks where you're settling and flags this step accordingly.
detail.ctaTitle: Where does this fall in your move?
detail.ctaBody: Whether this step even applies — and when it's due — depends on your passport, work, family and plans. Answer a few questions and Get Camino builds your full roadmap, every step in the right order with real deadlines.
detail.ctaNote: Free · about 3 minutes · no account needed to start
